ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client account was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for client login (hashed for security) */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the client (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the author of the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of the post */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the post is published or draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the client whose preference is recorded */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the preferred topic */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this topic is marked as a favorite */,
  "preference_level" INTEGER /* Level of preference for the topic (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_preferences_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_preferences_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the client involved in the engagement */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the post being engaged with */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken by the client (e.g., like, share, comment) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "engagement_level" INTEGER /* Level of engagement (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_engagements_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_engagements_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_topics" (
  "post_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-topic association */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_topics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the client */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the topic */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Total engagement count for the post-topic combination */,
  "total_engagement_level" INTEGER /* Total engagement level for the post-topic combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)
